item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-doc-exception-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses to add another invoice-exception paragraph, identifies the repeated same-class local repair pattern across refund/exchange/gift plus the new invoice request, moves upstream to a unified exception-handling documentation structure, and proposes consolidation/deletion into a general principles section. It does not directly add the requested standalone local patch; the only example text is framed as a consolidated structural rewrite with a temporary stopgap caveat."}
